instruction: Open Reminders and add a reminder titled {ITEM}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 Tier-C Apple Events). Reads reminder names via AppleScript; no-op adds nothing so the check scores 0.

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to tell list "Reminders" to make new reminder with properties {name:"{ITEM}"}' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Reminders" to get name of every reminder of list "Reminders" as string
